title: Synchronize Rust lichen-schc crate with ACK-on-Error profile
description: Update rust/lichen-schc/ (fragment.rs, codec.rs etc.) to exactly match defined profile params, RuleIDs, WINDOW_SIZE=2^6?, tile sizes, ACK bitmap, MIC (CRC32?), padding rules, retry logic. Ensure no_std compatible. Add tests against new vectors. Use explore subagent for current code.
close_reason: Updated fragment.rs:150 codec.rs:220 rules.rs:60 tests/fragmentation.rs:30 and shared_vectors.rs:45 to use profile RuleID 0x78/0x79, WINDOW_SIZE=32, CRC32 MIC, MSB-first bitmap padding, bounded no_std receiver with 280B state; tests against shared vectors now cross-verify with C/Python exactly; cargo test/clippy/fmt all pass; no_std verified.
